title: Membership Plans
subtitle: Choose the perfect plan for your learning journey
faq_1: Can I upgrade or downgrade anytime?
faq_1_answer: Yes, you can change your plan anytime. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing cycle.
faq_2: What payment methods do you accept?
faq_2_answer: We accept all major credit cards and digital payment methods.
faq_3: Do I need a credit card for the Basic plan?
faq_3_answer: No, the Basic plan is completely free and requires no payment method.
no_packages: No membership packages available at the moment.
payment_method_subtitle: Select how you'd like to upgrade your membership
payment_not_processed: Your payment was not processed. You have not been charged.
wait_process_payment: Please wait while we process your payment
preparing_payment_page: Please wait while we prepare your payment page
